---
title: "Math, Models & Real-World Problems"
author: "Eric Friedlander"
institute: "College of Idaho"
date: today
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [college-of-idaho.scss, logo.scss]
    logo: images/coilogo.png
    slide-number: true
    progress: true
    hash: true
    hash-type: number
    width: 1280
    height: 720
    transition: slide
    navigation-mode: linear
    controls: true
    scrollable: true
    footer: "Eric Friedlander | USF Colloquium 2026"
title-slide-attributes:
  data-background-color: "#533860"
execute:
  cache: true
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(mosaic)
library(reshape)
```

## About Me {#about}

- Born and raised outside New York City
- B.A., Mathematics & Statistics - **Rice University**
- PhD, Statistics & Operations Research — **UNC Chapel Hill**
- Business Analyst - **Capital One**
- Postdoc, Population Genetics — **University of Chicago**
- Assistant Professor of Mathematics - **St. Nobert College**
- Assistant Professor of Computer Science — **College of Idaho**

## Choose Your Adventure {#toc}

::: {style="font-size: 1.1em; line-height: 2.4em;"}
[🎲 Graduate School: Large Networks (Most Mathematical)](#grad-school)

[🧬 Postdoc: Population Genetics (Most polished, between math and statistics)](#pop-genetics)

[🌿 Chemometrics & Metabolomics (Current work, specific project)](#chemometrics)

[📊 Psychometrics (A bit of an intro to an understudied field)](#psychometrics)

[🌟 Star Formation (Most ML-heavy)](#star-formation)

[💡 Random Thoughts (Exactly what it sounds like)](#random-thoughts)
:::

{{< include sections/01-grad-school.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/02-pop-genetics.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/03-chemometrics.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/04-psychometrics.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/05-random-thoughts.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/06-star-formation.qmd >}}
